sections: Frozen full-file baseline at git:214a5b8eb182fce74478df49d4f55d226d65fdf5 with SHA-256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d
Terminal Planning Review 3 subject manifest and review contract

repo_truth: Planning/control-only continuation candidate on feat/handbook-contract-membrane at checkpoint HEAD 754970ef141c4e9efcce8ca6e76c683dbb248a11. The six manifest files are the only bytes under review. They remediate only HCM-0.9-PR3-001 and HCM-0.9-PR3-002. The audit covers all eleven frozen spans, 84 positional occurrences (31 same-leaf, 43 non-layout-dependent, 10 cross-leaf), 50 exact named/source-triggered routes R01-R50, and eight explicit non-route groups N01-N08. Every source leaf has an outbound route; no single route targets more than three sibling leaves, and routing is trigger-scoped rather than leaf-transitive, so normal selective use does not load most of the catalog. Unchanged 05/07/08, historical dispatches, and the stopped handoff are contextual authority only and are intentionally absent from the subject manifest. HCM-0.9 execution is not authorized by this dispatch.
allowed_scope: Replay the exact six-file subject manifest against the live repository and review those bytes read-only.

Independently audit all eleven frozen leaf spans, all positional references, named cross-leaf authority dependencies, exact source triggers/targets, routing topology, negative proof requirements, and the topology-redesign stop test.
Independently review subject-manifest versus unchanged authority-reference rules everywhere represented in the six-file subject.
Run read-only baseline, Markdown, audit, scope, archive, handoff, Git, and GitNexus checks as useful.
non_goals: No edits, commits, new dispatches, handoff records, ledger writes, or user task hops by the reviewer.
No decomposition or edit of 05-contracts-schemas-and-gates.md; no HCM-0.9 execution.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime, CLI, Tauri, Substrate, SDK/public API, HCM-0.5, topology redesign without audit proof, or unrelated planning improvement.
Do not rely on Planning Review 3 conclusions or the parent validation summary; independently judge the exact current subject and live authority.
tasks: Replay the sorted path/SHA-256 manifest and confirm it contains only and all six files whose bytes comprise this review subject; verify unchanged contextual authority is not manifested merely because it is read.
Check the frozen 05 baseline identity, eleven contiguous leaf spans, and every dependency-audit count/classification against live bytes, with special attention to leaves 1, 5, and 11.

Check every R01-R50 source trigger and exact target for completeness, justified semantic authority, target existence, source-leaf coverage, deterministic ordering/de-duplication, and absence of unjustified or omitted routes; inspect N01-N08 non-route decisions.
Determine whether normal selective routing would require loading most of the catalog. If it would, return a Required topology-redesign finding rather than approving the current topology.

Check that every planning representation requires derived completeness, omitted-route, broken-target, unjustified-route, and unclassified-reference proof and does not assume leaves 1-7 are dependency-free.

Check that manifests contain only reviewed bytes, changed routing/proof files are manifested when under review, unchanged authority remains in authority_refs/contracts_and_gates, and complete-catalog manifests do not add unchanged authority by default.
Review SPEC, plan, todo, seam crosswalk, proof ledger, and dependency audit for mutual consistency, executability, narrow scope, and no HCM-0.9 execution authorization in this session.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit. Each actionable finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated contract or invariant, why it is wrong, smallest valid remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only when no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: Human-authorized bounded continuation: preserve terminal Review 3 evidence; remediate only HCM-0.9-PR3-001 and HCM-0.9-PR3-002; at most two fresh continuation reviews and one intervening remediation
HCM-0.4 frozen 05 baseline at git:214a5b8eb182fce74478df49d4f55d226d65fdf5 and SHA-256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d
All-eleven dependency completeness and selective-routing topology stop: redesign only if normal trigger-scoped use loads most of the catalog
Subject manifests contain reviewed bytes only; unchanged contextual authority is referenced but not manifested by default
Continuation Review 1 of maximum two; stop immediately on CLEAN
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the complete manifest subject, frozen baseline, or required read-only validation is unavailable.
Return Critical or Required rather than authorizing decomposition, execution, Rust/runtime work, HCM-0.5, unrelated improvement, historical rewrite, or unjustified topology.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
